title: sbom.output
description: Software Bill of Materials extracted from a container image using Trivy (CycloneDX).

analyzer.description: Unique identifier for the SBOM analyzer.

repository.description: The image repository that was analyzed.

tag.description: The image tag that was analyzed.

has_sbom.description: True if an SBOM was successfully generated.

sbom_format.description: The format of the generated SBOM (e.g., CycloneDX).

sbom_version.description: Version of the SBOM specification used.

total_components.description: Total number of software components found (OS packages, apps, etc.).

component_types.description: Count of components grouped by type (library, application, framework, …).

total_dependencies.description: Total number of dependency relationships found.

licenses.description: Sorted unique license identifiers found across all components.

copyleft_licenses.description: Sorted subset of licenses that are known copyleft (GPL, LGPL, AGPL, MPL, EPL, etc.).

components.description: List of software components identified in the image.

licenses.description: List of licenses associated with this component.
